meta.top_strategy: Goal Deadline + Peer testimonial + No offer + Help me finish this goal + Generic + Generic grounding + Plain note + No friction reducer
meta.best_non_discount_strategy: Goal Deadline + Peer testimonial + No offer + Help me finish this goal + Generic + Generic grounding + Plain note + No friction reducer

progress_reflection.label: Progress Reflection
progress_reflection.description: Reflect back the learner's momentum, streaks, and real progress.

outcome_proof.label: Outcome Proof
outcome_proof.description: Lead with results, gains, and measurable outcomes.

mistake_recovery.label: Mistake Recovery
mistake_recovery.description: Position the product as a coach that helps recover from mistakes fast.

habit_identity.label: Habit Identity
habit_identity.description: Reinforce the learner identity and the value of staying consistent.

empathetic_exit.label: Empathetic Exit
empathetic_exit.description: Meet the user with empathy and reduce resistance before asking for a choice.

feature_unlock.label: Feature Unlock
feature_unlock.description: Highlight underused capabilities and unrealized value.

momentum_protection.label: Momentum Protection
momentum_protection.description: Frame cancellation as a break in a valuable learning rhythm.

cost_value_reframe.label: Cost / Value Reframe
cost_value_reframe.description: Make the product feel worth the cost versus the alternatives.

goal_deadline.label: Goal Deadline
goal_deadline.description: Tie the choice to the learner's immediate test, exam, or deadline.

flexibility_relief.label: Flexibility Relief
flexibility_relief.description: Reduce fear by showing softer paths than all-or-nothing cancellation.

fresh_start_reset.label: Fresh Start Reset
fresh_start_reset.description: Offer a clean restart for users who feel behind or disengaged.

none.label: No explicit proof
none.description: Rely on the message angle without added evidence.

quantified_outcome.label: Quantified outcome
quantified_outcome.description: Use concrete, data-backed claims or performance metrics.

peer_testimonial.label: Peer testimonial
peer_testimonial.description: Use a quote or story from a similar learner.

similar_user_story.label: Similar user story
similar_user_story.description: Show a learner with a similar use case succeeding with the product.

expert_validation.label: Expert validation
expert_validation.description: Use educator or study-science framing to create authority.

personal_usage_signal.label: Personal usage signal
personal_usage_signal.description: Reference the user's own study behavior or product usage.

generic.label: Generic
generic.description: Broad category-level copy with little user-specific detail.

contextual.label: Contextual
contextual.description: Use the user's study context or broad product usage context.

behavioral.label: Behavioral
behavioral.description: Reference meaningful behavior patterns or progress.

highly_specific.label: Highly specific
highly_specific.description: Use deeply personalized phrasing that may feel powerful or creepy.

top_strategies.label: Goal Deadline + Peer testimonial + No offer + Help me finish this goal + Generic + Generic grounding + Plain note + No friction reducer
top_strategies.sample_message: You're close enough to a real goal in sleep science exam that this is a bad moment to lose support. Other learners in similar study modes tell us the product starts paying off once they keep the loop going for a few more sessions. CTA: Help me finish this goal

Other learners in similar study modes tell us the product starts paying off once they keep the loop going for a few more sessions. If price is the issue, we can lower this cycle by 10%. CTA: Help me finish this goal
